data.title: Barrick Gold Preps For Q2 Earnings: Will It Unearth Bullish Prospects?
data.description: Barrick Gold reports Q2 earnings Monday. The stock is down 4.15% YTD but chart signals potential bullish breakout. Analysts see 45.85% upside.

data.title: Copper Mining Breakthrough: How Strategic Partnerships Are Paying Off
data.description: American Pacific Mining is advancing in the copper and base metals market through partnerships and drilling. Copper demand is rising for renewable energy.

data.title: Harris Vs. Trump: Expert Says S&P 500 Trends Could Predict 2024 Presidential Election Outcome
data.description: The stock market predictor, though not perfect, is noteworthy. The S&P 500 is currently down about 0.5% since the three-month window opened on Monday, hinting at the Republicans as the likely winners in November.

data.title: Why Is Software Company Five9 Stock Diving Premarket Friday?
data.description: FIVN shares down after Q2 2024 results, revenue guidance reduced, Acqueon acquisition announced.

data.title: Rivian Kicks Off Months-Long Promotional Roadshow With Upcoming R2 SUV, R3X Crossover
data.description: California-based EV startup Rivian Automotive on Thursday announced that its upcoming vehicles are out for a promotional roadshow, starting from Pasadena.
